app.noAccessMessage: Only administrators can log in to the admin panel.

login.title: Famlin Admin
login.subtitleWithSso: Log in with {{name}} or your Famlin email/password.
login.subtitleWithoutSso: Log in with your Famlin email/password.

setup.title: Welcome to Famlin
setup.subtitle: This server has no admin account yet. Create one to get started.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} ({{email}})?
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

groups.title: Groups
groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete group "{{name}}"?
groups.selectGroupHint: Select a group to manage its members.
groups.noMembers: No members in this group yet.

invites.title: Invite a family member
invites.hint: Share the link or send it by email — they only create an account once they accept. No need to add them as a user first.
invites.revokeConfirm: Revoke this invite link? It will stop working immediately.

mediaAlbums.title: Linked albums
mediaAlbums.notConfigured: Configure this media source in Server settings to link albums.
mediaAlbums.loadError: Could not read this media source to list albums — linked albums still work.
mediaAlbums.noAlbums: No albums linked to this group yet.
mediaAlbums.newAssetMode.offHelp: New photos in this album won't be surfaced to members.
mediaAlbums.newAssetMode.manualHelp: Members get a notification when new photos appear in this album.
mediaAlbums.newAssetMode.autoHelp: A post is automatically created in the group feed when new photos appear.

content.title: Content moderation
content.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this?

serverSettings.title: Server settings
serverSettings.defaultLanguageHint: Used for server-rendered pages without a signed-in user, such as the invite link page.
serverSettings.storeUrlsHint: Optional. If set, the invite link page shows download buttons for people who don't have the app yet. Leave blank to hide them.
serverSettings.oidcClientSecretHint: Only needed for providers that reject a secretless PKCE exchange, such as Google. Leave blank for providers like Authentik/Keycloak/Auth0 that support a public/native client. When set, Famlin exchanges the authorization code on the backend instead of in the browser or app.
serverSettings.oidcHint: Works with any OpenID Connect provider (Google, Microsoft, Authentik, Keycloak, Auth0, ...). Register Famlin as a public/native client with PKCE and add this app's redirect URIs.
serverSettings.allowedEmailsHint: Comma-separated. SSO sign-ins are limited to these addresses; leave empty to allow everyone. Invite links always work regardless of this list.
serverSettings.pushHint: Sent via Expo's push relay (no Apple/Google credentials needed on your server). Turn off if you don't want the server to send push notifications at all — in-app and email notifications are unaffected.
serverSettings.emailHint: Turn off if you don't want the server to send email notifications at all — in-app and push notifications are unaffected.
serverSettings.integrationsHint: Each media source is configured once for the whole instance; which albums are visible to which group is linked from the Groups page. Members can then pick photos from a linked album when composing a post.
serverSettings.immichHint: Configure one Immich server + API key. Recommended API key permissions: album.read, asset.read, asset.view, asset.download.
serverSettings.immichTestUnauthorized: Connected, but the API key was rejected.
serverSettings.immichTestUnreachable: Could not reach the Immich server.
serverSettings.localMediaHint: Serve photos straight from a directory on this server (e.g. a NAS share mounted into the container). Every subdirectory of the path becomes a linkable album; only image files are listed.
serverSettings.localMediaTestNotFound: Path not found or not readable from the server.
serverSettings.localMediaTestNotADirectory: Path exists but is not a directory.

peopleMapping.title: People mapping
peopleMapping.hint: Map people detected in your photos to family members so they appear with their names in the family feed. Only mapped people become visible to family members.
peopleMapping.notConfigured: Immich is not configured yet. Fill in the server URL and API key above and save to map people.
peopleMapping.noPeople: No people found in your Immich library.
peopleMapping.userMappingHint: If set, this person's photos will be tagged with their Famlin profile. Leave empty to show the display name only.
